name: brain-citation
description: Read-only Obsidian/Zotero citation diagnostics for the rtime brain library.

interface.longDescription: Brain Citation provides read-only diagnostics for Obsidian wikilinks, Zotero URI clues, BibTeX citekey coverage, DocPack citation anchors, and citation review risks in the rtime brain library.
defaultPrompt: Check Obsidian and Zotero citation readiness.
Find missing BibTeX coverage for citekeys.
